en-US.description:
TaskForceAI is a mobile client for managing multi-agent AI workflows.

Use the app without an account to browse local settings, access privacy/support links, and draft prompts locally on your device.

A free account is required to run AI tasks, sync conversations, use projects, connect desktop sessions, and manage account-based history across devices.

Optional paid subscriptions are sold separately through in-app purchase. Pro and Super plans unlock higher usage limits and premium account features; they are not included with the free download.

Designed for developers and power users building AI-driven workflows.

https://www.taskforceai.chat/terms
en-US.title: TaskForceAI
en-US.subtitle: Multi-Agent Orchestration

review.notes:
Guideline 5.1.1(v): Reviewers can tap "Continue without an account" on the sign-in screen. Guest mode allows access to the app shell, local prompt drafts, local settings, privacy policy, terms, support contact, and local data controls without registration. Account-based features require sign-in: running AI tasks, syncing conversations, projects, desktop sessions, subscriptions, account export, and account deletion.

Guideline 2.3.2: The App Store description states that Pro and Super are optional paid subscriptions sold separately through in-app purchase. RevenueCat manages these auto-renewable subscriptions.

Credentials for account-based review, if needed, must be provided only through App Store Connect review notes and not committed to source control.
